originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&family` is never used.

reasoning: No ERROR comment and no TRUE record for 581635e28f1.c. APR_INET6 is defined as 6 when APR_HAVE_IPV6=T (L1-3). int family = APR_INET6 at L7 assigns family but family is never subsequently read — genuine dead store. New bug. The PC (APR_HAVE_IPV6=T) exactly captures when this occurs: IPV6=F makes APR_INET6 undefined (compile error), and IPV6=T is the only valid config for this code. Correctly constrained.
